---
title: "GLS supervised calibrations analyses"
author: Diego Vicente Sastre
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: github_document
abstract:
  "R script to extract sun angles of calibration periods of light-level
   geolocators"
  
---
We load required packages and functions elaborated for simplify the process

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
pacman::p_load('devtools','remotes', # loading packages
               'readxl', # opening Excels and csv
               'tidyverse',  #manging data
               'lubridate', # dealing with dates
               'maps', 'rworldmap', 'maptools', # creating map for preprocessLight
               'GeoLight', 'BAStag', 'TwGeos','SGAT' # geolocators
               )
detach("package:purrr", unload = TRUE)
source('Functions/FUNCTION_datetime_conversion.R')
source("Functions/01_FUNCTIONS_Supervised_GLS_calibrations.R")
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, tidy.opts = list(width.cutoff = 40), tidy = TRUE)
```


```{r, include=FALSE, echo=F, message=F, warning=F}
GLS.files <- read_csv('RawData/GLS.files.csv', col_names = TRUE)
GLS.info <- read_csv('RawData/GLS.info.csv', col_names = TRUE)
calib.info <- read_csv('RawData/Info.calibrations.csv')

col.name <- 'Veneguera'
col.lat <- 27.84444
col.lon <- -15.78861

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, tidy.opts = list(width.cutoff = 40), tidy = TRUE)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```
